elements.original_description: A person stands in the center of the frame with a confused expression, surrounded by a dark cloud. A light bulb hangs above them, but it is turned off. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph, cinematic lighting with high contrast, a person stands in the center of the frame with a confused expression, surrounded by a thick, dark cloud. A light bulb hangs above their head, clearly visible but turned off and dark. The overall mood is somber and mysterious. Sharp focus on the subject, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
